title: Game News Round-Up
summary: Daily curated games-industry news digest for 16 April 2025.

items.title: **Dune: Awakening** delayed for last minute changes from beta testers
**Metal Gear in Concert** coming to London later this year
bullets: Two performances of the show will take place on Saturday, November 1 – a matinee performance at 2.30pm and an evening performance at 7.30pm.

items.title: **Niantic** lays off 68 workers following Scopely acquisition
bullets: Employees were notified on March 20, 2025, layoffs effective from May 20
